phases.name: Design system & landing page
phases.detail: Token-driven components, WCAG-graded palette, SVG iconography shipped in v2.0.0 (PR #19).

phases.name: Planning & process docs
phases.detail: Data pipeline plan, branching and release process, prompt archive, status page shipped in PR #26.

phases.name: Phase A: Daily OSINT data pipeline
phases.detail: Daily Overpass ETL live: 39 auto-listed Oakland venues published via data-sync.yml (daily 10:41 UTC). PR #27 shipped.

phases.name: Phase B: Community submissions
phases.detail: GitHub Issue Form live; hourly ingest validates, sanitizes (XSS boundary), publishes as Community reports. PR #28 shipped.

phases.name: Phase C: Email confirmations
phases.detail: Resend confirmations for submissions (design decision pending: Reply-to-Confirm recommended). See PHASE_C_DESIGN_DECISION.md.

phases.name: Phases D & E: Staleness & licensing
phases.detail: Weekly liveness checks (Phase D), auto-demotion for stale venues; README data-sources, privacy policy updates (Phase E). See PHASES_D_E_PLANNING.md.
